qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt missed. Ante Budimir (Croatia) left footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Nikola Vlasic.

events.description: 安特·布迪米尔射门偏出。 尼古拉·弗拉希奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Dominik Livakovic (Croatia). Assisted by Rafael Leão.

events.description: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯射正。 拉斐尔·莱奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box is blocked.

events.description: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Vitinha (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
João Neves (Portugal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Dominik Livakovic.
Attempt missed. João Cancelo (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is too high following a corner.
Attempt missed. Ante Budimir (Croatia) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Nikola Vlasic with a cross.

events.description: 安特·布迪米尔射门偏出。 尼古拉·弗拉希奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Nuno Mendes (Portugal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

player.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by João Cancelo (Portugal).
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Marin Pongracic.
Attempt missed. Renato Veiga (Portugal) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Nuno Mendes with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 雷纳托·韦加射门偏出。 努诺·门德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Rúben Dias (Portugal).
Rúben Dias (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Renato Veiga (Portugal).
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Marin Pongracic.
Attempt missed. João Neves (Portugal) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box is too high. Assisted by Nuno Mendes with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 若昂·内维斯射门偏出。 努诺·门德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Martin Baturina (Croatia) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Petar Sucic.

events.description: 马丁·巴图林纳射门被封堵。 佩塔尔·苏西克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Croatia. Nikola Vlasic is caught offside.
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Ivan Perisic.
Attempt blocked. Nuno Mendes (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by João Cancelo.

events.description: 努诺·门德斯射门被封堵。 若昂·坎塞洛参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Vitinha (Portugal) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Josip Stanisic.
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Josip Sutalo.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Ante Budimir.

events.description: 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇替补登场，换下安特·布迪米尔。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Portugal 0, Croatia 0.
Nuno Mendes (Portugal) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Rafael Leão (Portugal) right footed shot from the left side of the box is too high.
Rúben Dias (Portugal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Mateo Kovacic (Croatia) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Igor Matanovic.

events.description: 马特奥·科瓦契奇射正。 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Rúben Dias (Portugal).
Corner, Croatia. Conceded by Diogo Costa.
Foul by João Neves (Portugal).
Attempt missed. Nikola Vlasic (Croatia) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left following a corner.

events.description: 尼古拉·弗拉希奇射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Vitinha (Portugal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Mateo Kovacic (Croatia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Goal! Portugal 0, Croatia 1. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal.

events.description: 伊万·佩里西奇破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Croatia. Nikola Vlasic is caught offside.
Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Petar Sucic (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Martin Baturina.

events.description: 佩塔尔·苏西克射正。 马丁·巴图林纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Croatia. Conceded by Diogo Costa.
Vitinha (Portugal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Luka Modric (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Offside, Portugal. Cristiano Ronaldo is caught offside.
Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces Vitinha.

events.description: 贝尔纳多·席尔瓦替补登场，换下维蒂尼亚。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.

events.description: 弗朗西斯科·孔塞桑替补登场，换下佩德罗·内托。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Bruno Fernandes.

events.description: 内尔松·塞梅多替补登场，换下布鲁诺·费尔南德斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Portugal. Gonçalo Ramos replaces João Cancelo.

events.description: 贡卡洛·拉莫斯替补登场，换下若昂·坎塞洛。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Dominik Livakovic.
Penalty Portugal. Renato Veiga draws a foul in the penalty area.
VAR Decision: Penalty Portugal.

player.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Portugal 1, Croatia 1. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.

events.description: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多破门。 比分 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Martin Baturina.

events.description: 马里奥·帕萨里克替补登场，换下马丁·巴图林纳。

events.description: 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Mateo Kovacic (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Mario Pasalic.

events.description: 马特奥·科瓦契奇射正。 马里奥·帕萨里克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Mateo Kovacic (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Igor Matanovic with a headed pass.

events.description: 马特奥·科瓦契奇射正。 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇参与进攻。

events.description: 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇射门偏出。 莫德里奇参与进攻。

events.description: 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇射正。

Second Half ends, Portugal 2, Croatia 1.
